source.title: How do I withdraw my Claim Stake from Faction Claims?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How do I withdraw my Claim Stake from Faction Claims?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
If you no longer want to generate R4 with your Claim Stake or plan to sell it, you’ll need to withdraw it from Faction Claims first.
1. Go to the Faction Claims page and connect your wallet.
2. Find the Claim Stake you wish to withdraw and click “Manage”.
3. In the Manage Claims tab, click “Withdraw All Stakes”
4. Approve the transaction in your wallet.
⚠️ Withdrawing a Claim Stake will stop its R4 production immediately
